name: Pen y Fan Circular (Motorway Route)
terrain: Stone pitched path, grass ridge, steep climb
highlights: Highest peak in South Wales (886m); iconic twin summit of Pen y Fan & Corn Du.
points_of_interest: Tommy Jones obelisk, Bronze Age cairns on summit
viewpoints: Summit panorama: Black Mountains, Bristol Channel, Carmarthen Fans on clear days
picnic_spots: Corn Du saddle (Bwlch Duwynt); grassy flat below Corn Du
parking_start: Pont ar Daf pay & display car park (off A470)
food_drink_nearby: Storey Arms nearby (no food); The Tai'r Bull Inn, Libanus; Felin Fach Griffin further afield
public_transport: T4 bus Cardiff–Brecon stops at Storey Arms
hazards_notes: Exposed to weather; path heavily eroded; busy at weekends
